fields.name: id
fields.note: drift int autoIncrement as-built; UUIDv7 string per Supersede S-2

fields.name: kind
fields.note: code field is `kind` (not `type`); drift default 'info'. UI observed values: payment | overdue | reminder | insight | (fallback info). Drives presentation-only _style icon/color map AND tap routing (payment/insight/_ -> /activity, reminder -> /reminders, overdue -> /debts)

fields.name: read
fields.note: unread dot when false; drift default false

fields.name: createdAt
fields.note: used for desc sort and client-side Today/Earlier grouping + relative time label

filtersOrSort: client-side grouping into Today vs Earlier by createdAt calendar day (presentation, not a server filter)

actions.name: markAllRead
actions.note: repo.markAllNotificationsRead() writes read=true to ALL notification rows (no id payload). As-built returns void (Future); UI relies on the watchNotifications stream re-emitting. Auto-fired ~2s after the screen is viewed (initState post-frame). No per-item read/dismiss/delete action exists.

authContext.note: No explicit role gating in the screen UI (single-user owner app). Recorded owner per conventions: push/notification surface is owner-only (debtors never install the app). Feed is business-scoped.

special.note: Live updates come from a local drift Stream (offline-first watch), not a backend realtime/websocket channel. Backend push is a declared owner-only surface (may ship later) per conventions.md.

uiStatesHandled: loading (StreamBuilder before first emission — renders nothing/empty ListView until hasData)
auto-mark-all-read on view (~2s after open, clears bell badge)
